title: Centre tells Supreme Court it will bring back persons allegedly ‘pushed’ to Bangladesh
content: Senior advocates Kapil Sibal and Sanjay Hegde, appearing for Ms. Khatun’s father Bhodu Sekh, had been repeatedly seeking a hearing in court. Mr. Mehta’s submission came as a relief to the petitioner’s side

title: Delhi HC seeks response from AAP’s Gopal Rai, journalist in contempt plea
content: Justice Sharma had on May 14 initiated criminal contempt proceedings against Mr. Kejriwal, Manish Sisodia and other AAP leaders over their “vilifying” social media posts against her in relation to the excise policy case.

title: India successfully test-fires Agni-1 ballistic missile from Odisha
content: Earlier, on May 8, the country had successfully carried out a flight trial of an advanced Agni missile with Multiple Independently Targetable Re-Entry Vehicle off the coast of the State

title: Marco Rubio in India LIVE: Rubio visits Saint Teresa's Missionaries of Charity in Kolkata
content: U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio is scheduled to hold wide-ranging talks with External Affairs Minister S. Jaishankar, in addition to meeting Prime Minister Narendra Modi and attending a meeting of the Quad Foreign Ministers in New Delhi.

title: Five killed in cruiser-lorry collision near Wadi in Kalaburagi district
content: Rural Development and Panchayat Raj Minister and Kalaburagi district in-charge Priyank Kharge expressed shock and grief over the incident and directed the district administration to extend necessary assistance to the families of the deceased

title: For every job at Mazagon Dock, 6.4 jobs are created across economy: Captain Jagmohan
content: The Maritime Amrit Kaal Vision  2047 aims to place India among the top five shipbuilding countries by 2047, with an annual capacity of 4.5 million gross tonnage and an expected investment of ₹4.5 lakh crore.

title: No permission for human chain protest called by Cockroach Janta Party: Bengaluru police
content: The poster circulating online carried the tagline: “Not just online, it’s time to show power in the streets”

title: Supreme Court refers UAPA bail curbs to larger Bench for ‘authoritative’ ruling
content: Amid “perceived conflict” among Benches, top court refuses to examine “correctness of observations” made in a recent ruling; it grants interim bail to two Delhi riots accused; Additional Solicitor General says courts must strike balance between “interests of society” and “rights of accused”

title: U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio arrives in Kolkata, visits Saint Teresa’s Mother House
content: Rubio’s India itinerary, scheduled from May 23 to 26 and also encompassing Agra, Jaipur, and New Delhi, is being viewed as diplomatically significant for his scheduled energy talks with India and the meeting with Ministers from the Quad nations.

title: Jaishankar to host Quad Foreign Ministers meet on May 26: MEA
content: Indo-Pacific grouping expected to discuss U.S. President Trump’s China visit, the Iran war, and the Hormuz blockade; U.S. Secretary of State Marco Rubio to arrive on May 23 for four-day bilateral talks

title: Silver price surge takes the shine off Karimnagar Silver Filigree art
content: A steep rise in silver prices over five years has severely impacted Karimnagar’s GI-tagged filigree industry, slashing sales and artisan incomes. With buyers shifting to bullion investments, craftsmen struggle to sustain livelihoods despite adapting with smaller, lighter designs and reduced margins.

title: BJP's Bengal win can reshape India's economic direction: Pradeep Gupta
content: Pradeep Gupta pointed out that regions with a strong port infrastructure and trade networks historically became centres of prosperity

title: Two arrested for abduction, murder of 10-year-old girl near Coimbatore
content: Karthik (33) of Nagapattinam, who has been residing at Pallapalayam near Coimbatore, and his friend Mohanraj, were arrested for alleged involvement in the crime

title: NEET-UG candidates can submit bank details for fee refund till May 27: NTA
content: In a public notice, the agency said candidates can log in to the NEET-UG 2026 registration portal using their credentials and access the refund link to submit preferred bank account details for processing of fee refunds.

title: Modi expresses support for the sovereignty and territorial integrity of Cyprus
content: Cyprus calls for energising IMEEC that will connect India with EU; expresses interest in buying items from the Indian defence industry

title: Severe heatwave conditions likely to prevail over parts of India: IMD
content: Heatwave and warm night conditions are expected in Northwest India, Central and East India, and parts of Peninsular India

title: Demand driving growth, but economic outlook ‘somewhat clouded’ by supply issues: RBI
content: The central bank said that while inflation currently was within the tolerance band, the potential pass through of higher prices needed to be monitored

title: Twisha Sharma death case: husband taken into custody, M.P. HC allows second autopsy
content: Earlier, Samarth Singh reached the Jabalpur district court on the evening of May 22, to surrender, his lawyer said; the anticipatory bail application was filed before the high court on May 21, 2026, after a subordinate court turned down his plea last week

title: Vadodara to host Vibrant Gujarat Regional Conference in June
content: Covering 10 districts — Ahmedabad, Anand, Chhotaudepur, Dahod, Gandhinagar, Kheda, Mahisagar, Narmada, Panchmahal and Vadodara — Central Gujarat accounts for 28% of the state’s total manufacturing output, according to official data

title: Debt and distress: youth caught in cricket betting trap
content: The rise of social media and easily accessible money-making applications has significantly altered the dynamics of betting and gambling in the State. Recent police crackdowns have uncovered syndicates linked to international networks, involving hundreds of mule bank accounts and transactions worth hundreds of crores of rupees. Officials warn that many individuals—particularly unemployed youth and students—are falling into severe debt, addiction, and psychological distress. This highlights the urgent need for awareness campaigns, counselling initiatives, and stronger digital regulations, writes Harish Gilai.

title: Rajasthan Cabinet approves new industrial development policy with focus on talent economy
content: Industries and Commerce Minister Rajyavardhan Singh Rathore told journalists after the meeting that the new policy would provide incentives to micro, small, and medium enterprises, one district one product, and the export sector

title: Punjab government to remove stray dogs from high footfall public spaces following Supreme Court order
content: Bhagwant Mann said the government will create and maintain an adequate number of dog shelters where stray dogs can be properly cared for

title: Public hearing for limestone mining called off in Meghalaya after protest
content: Protestors and supporters of a ₹1,800-crore integrated cement plant and limestone mining project had a brief stand-off at the public hearing venue in East Jaiñtia Hills district

title: Bengal CM on first visit to Delhi after taking charge, meets President, Prime Minister and Home Minister
content: The West Bengal Chief Minister posted on social media that the Prime Minister Narendra Modi re-emphasized his vision of Sabka Saath, Sabka Vikas and reiterated that the development of West Bengal remains a top priority for the Central Government.

title: ‘The Hindu is another name for trust,’ says Eknath Shinde
content: Eknath Shinde outlined his government’s focus on reducing regional disparities, citing Gadchiroli’s development as equal in priority to Mumbai

title: Infrastructure is foundation of economic growth, says M. Jamshed
content: M. Jamshed described Maharashtra as a “lighthouse” for infrastructure development from Delhi’s perspective and expressed hope that the State would continue to retain that position

title: Mumbai, Maharashtra emerging as key hubs for global investment and clean energy partnerships, say diplomats
content: Calling Mumbai the Indian city most visited by Australian business delegations, Paul Murphy said Australian companies were increasingly looking at Maharashtra as a long-term investment destination across infrastructure

title: Saffron clashes with green, again
content: On May 15, a Division Bench of the Madhya Pradesh High Court declared the disputed Bhojshala-Kamal Maula complex in Dhar a temple dedicated to goddess Saraswati, based on a survey by the ASI. While Hindus are celebrating the unrestricted access they have been given to the historical monument, Muslims allege that the survey and verdict were predetermined. Mehul Malpani reports from the sensitive town

title: Rubio's maiden India visit aims to repair strained ties; boost Quad cooperation
content: The top U.S. diplomat is scheduled to hold wide-ranging talks with External Affairs Minister S. Jaishankar, in addition to meeting Prime Minister Narendra Modi and attending a meeting of the Quad Foreign Ministers in New Delhi

title: Ahead of kharif season, Dharwad Deputy Commissioner warns traders of strict action ‘creating artificial scarcity’
content: In the wake of early showers and expected onset of monsoon in the first week of June, farmers in Dharwad district have already started pre sowing activities and, Deputy Commissioner of Dharwad Snehal R. held a video conference with officials and dealers of seeds and fertilisers and farmer leaders

title: Bengali actors face heat after power shift to BJP; FIR filed over 2021 social media posts linked to post-poll violence
content: Parambrata Chatterjee says he had to ‘compromise’ and align with the TMC led by former Chief Minister Mamata Banerjee for the sake of his one-year-old son

title: NIFT students showcase their creations at graduation show
content: The Graduation Show also had a curated exhibition displaying concept boards, installations, and interactive displays

title: Demand for Dharwad corporation: On eighth day of protest, relay hunger strike launched
content: agitation seeking bifurcation of Hubballi Dharwad Municipal Corporation to create separate municipal corporation for Dharwad entered the eighth day on Friday and intensifying the agitation the agitation committee launched relay hunger strike.

title: TANUVAS invites applications for UG courses
content: Candidates from Tamil Nadu could apply through the portal https://adm.tanuvas.ac.in from 10 a.m. on May 25 to 5 p.m. of June 17

title: CM tours iconic spots at Fort St. George
content: He toured the campus in a battery-operated car, after visiting St. Mary’s Church. Hundreds of Secretariat staff, government employees, and the public gathered to greet the Chief Minister

title: Staff must come with a mindset to serve devotees: Minister
content: S. Ramesh said that Chief Minister C. Joseph Vijay had promised to provide a stable and clean governance and the department too should follow the same

title: Jana Nayagan leak case: Madras High Court denies bail to six accused
content: Three other accused do not press their bail applications since they had been detained under the Goondas Act

title: Centre promised more legislative powers for Ladakh, says delegation
content: Home Ministry officials have proposed a new mechanism within the existing Union Territory framework, say representatives from the Leh Apex Body and the Kargil Democratic Alliance

title: Govt. to move HC on behalf of Dalit families facing eviction
content: If the court verdict turns unfavourable, the government will rehabilitate families by providing them with houses and land, says Minister Roji M. John; no police action until govt. approaches court on Monday

title: ‘Development is not about factories or roads; we must connect with people’
content: Maharashtra Deputy CM Eknath Shinde highlights the importance of projects in Maoist-affected areas of the State, batting for a cluster-based approach to development that covers multiple villages; he says the government’s monthly aid scheme for women will not be halted at any cost

title: Water Metro service in Mumbai Metropolitan Region by 2028: Nitesh Rane
content: Maharashtra Minister for Fisheries and Ports Development outlines the progress made in the maritime sector in the State while speaking at The Hindu’s ‘Maharashtra Infrastructure Conclave 2026’

title: Karnataka govt. extends viability gap funding of ₹28.47 crore to resume flights from Bengaluru to Bidar, Kalaburagi
content: The government is committed to enhancing air connectivity to Tier-2 and Tier-3 cities across the State. Such initiatives would not only accelerate regional economic growth but also contribute to infrastructure development: M.B. Patil

title: CNG prices hiked for third time by Re 1 per kg - check rates in your city
content: CNG prices have seen a third hike in under ten days, now costing Rs 81.09 per kg in Delhi. This follows recent increases in petrol and diesel prices, driven by surging global crude oil costs due to Middle East tensions. Transport operators are protesting, demanding fare revisions and a rollback of fuel surcharges.

title: Delhi's Shastri Park market blaze: Fire tenders pelted with stones over delayed response; watch
content: A massive fire engulfed a furniture market in Delhi's Shastri Park, prompting an angry response from locals who allegedly pelted stones at initial fire tenders due to a perceived slow response. While the blaze, fueled by flammable materials, has been extinguished, authorities are investigating its cause. No casualties were reported.

title: India’s white-ball blind spot: Where does Yashasvi Jaiswal fit?
content: Yashasvi Jaiswal’s omission from India’s ODI squad for the Afghanistan series has slipped under the radar. Despite scoring an unbeaten century in his last ODI appearance and playing a key role in reshaping India’s aggressive T20 batting approach after the 2022 T20 World Cup, the 24-year-old has quietly gone out of contention in both formats. With no spot in the India A squad either, Jaiswal finds himself in an unusual limbo despite being regarded as an all-format player and one of India’s brightest batting talents.

title: Petrol, diesel prices hiked third time, sees increase by around 90 paise — check rates in your city
content: Fuel prices have seen a third hike in under 10 days as global crude oil prices surge due to the West Asia conflict and Strait of Hormuz disruptions. State-run oil companies are facing significant losses, prompting these revisions after a period of unchanged prices. India is taking steps to secure energy supplies and urges citizens to conserve fuel.

title: Google co-founder Sergey Brin donates $500,000 to group fighting ‘overpaid CEO tax’
content: Google co-founder Sergey Brin is injecting significant funds into San Francisco's local politics, backing a business-friendly tax proposal while opposing a controversial "Overpaid CEO Tax."  This move, following his relocation from Silicon Valley, reflects Brin's broader campaign against wealth redistribution measures, which he links to his personal experience fleeing socialism.

title: NEET UG 2026 fee refund link activated on neet.nta.nic.in; submit bank details here
content: The National Testing Agency has activated the NEET UG 2026 refund link on its official registration portal for candidates to submit bank account details for fee refund processing. The facility is available from May 22, 2026, to May 27, 2026, up to 11:50 pm. Candidates must log in to neet.nta.nic.in and provide account details, including IFSC code and account number. Submitted information will be final, with no further changes permitted after submission.

title: No handshake! Kohli completely ignores Head after match - Watch
content: Virat Kohli and Travis Head were involved in a heated exchange during RCB’s chase against SRH in IPL 2026. Kohli later ignored Head’s handshake after the match, sparking attention. SRH posted 255/4 with strong knocks from Abhishek Sharma, Ishan Kishan and Heinrich Klaasen, winning by 55 runs. Despite the defeat, RCB finished top of the league table after crossing the required score mark.

title: Rain, cloudy skies bring relief to Delhi-NCR after days of scorching heat
content: Delhi experienced a welcome respite from intense heatwave conditions on Saturday morning with light rainfall and cool breezes. Despite the temporary relief, the IMD has issued an orange alert for heatwave conditions to persist until May 28, with maximum temperatures expected to remain high.

title: Mark Zuckerberg's email to employees has a 'goodbye note' for those laid off
content: Meta has initiated significant layoffs, sending emails to thousands of employees whose positions are being eliminated.  Company leadership confirmed the decision to reduce headcount for increased efficiency.  Meta CEO Mark Zuckerberg also sent a company-wide memo expressing gratitude to departing employees and outlining future company direction.  He assured remaining staff that no further company-wide layoffs are expected this year.

title: IRGC-trained Iraqi arrested over assassination plot against Trump's daughter Ivanka
content: An IRGC-trained operative, allegedly seeking revenge for Qasem Soleimani's death, was arrested in Turkey and extradited to the US. Mohammad Baqer Saad Dawood Al-Saadi is accused of plotting to assassinate Ivanka Trump, even possessing a blueprint of her Florida home. He reportedly made threats against Americans online.

title: IPL Playoff Scenarios Explained: RR, PBKS, KKR, DC in race for final spot
content: The IPL 2026 playoff race intensifies with four teams vying for the final spot. Sunrisers Hyderabad secured a win but missed a top-two finish. Rajasthan Royals are frontrunners, needing a win against Mumbai Indians. Punjab Kings, Kolkata Knight Riders, and Delhi Capitals face uphill battles, requiring specific results and strong Net Run Rates to qualify.

title: WWE SmackDown results & highlights
content: SmackDown's go-home show for Saturday Night's Main Event delivered intense action.  Tiffany Stratton retained her US title, while Carmelo Hayes and Trick Williams clashed.  The main event saw Cody Rhodes defeat Sami Zayn, but the night concluded with a shocking post-match attack by Gunther on Rhodes, leaving fans stunned.

title: Amazon Web Services CEO Matt Garman not worried that AI going to replace him as CEO
content: AWS CEO Matt Garman isn't worried about AI replacing him, stating the real threat comes from competitors who master the technology. He believes AI is transforming, not eliminating, developer roles, shifting focus to system architecture and problem-solving. Despite layoffs, Amazon continues to hire software developers, emphasizing adaptability in the evolving tech landscape.

title: Was Boeing responsible for deadly crashes that killed 346? What US jury said
content: LOT had demanded $250 million in damages, accusing Boeing of misleading airlines about the safety of the MAX jets before the Lion Air and Ethiopian Airlines disasters killed 346 people and triggered a worldwide suspension of the aircraft. But after hearing the case in a Seattle federal court, jurors sided with Boeing, dismissing allegations that the company committed fraud or concealed critical information about the aircraft.

title: Bhajji’s ‘doosra’, claims AAP sold Rajya Sabha seat in Punjab
content: Former cricketer Harbhajan Singh has accused the Aam Aadmi Party of selling a Rajya Sabha seat from Punjab. He made these allegations in response to criticism about his own political switch. Congress leaders have urged him to reveal more details. They claim this exposes the truth about how seats are allocated.

title: Gurgaon blackout: 8 substations fail, ACs stop, metro commuters walk on tracks - video
content: A major power outage plunged Gurgaon into darkness Friday evening due to a fault at a 220kV substation, exacerbating the city's struggle with soaring temperatures. The blackout disrupted essential services, including the Rapid Metro, leaving thousands without power and commuters stranded. Officials are working to restore supply, but repairs are expected to take hours.

title: NFL Injury Report: Malik Nabers’ injury situation keeps getting worse as the Giants refuse to promise week 1 return
content: New York Giants' electrifying receiver Malik Nabers faces a complex knee recovery with no clear return timeline. Coach John Harbaugh described the process as a 'slog,' with a second surgery adding to the uncertainty. Nabers, a standout rookie, is crucial to the Giants' offense, making his Week 1 availability against the Cowboys genuinely uncertain.

title: Cale Makar, Tracy Evans net worth 2026: Earnings, lifestyle and investments
content: The 2026 NHL buzz is also coming from Cale Makar and Tracy Evans, whose wealth, endorsements and profile are on the rise. The Colorado Avalanche star and his wife are still a hot topic in hockey after they tied the knot in 2024. That’s a lot of pressure on the couple’s estimated net worth. Makar’s net worth from his NHL salary, endorsement deals and future contract value has all reached the $13.5 million mark a year.

title: Will De’Aaron Fox play tonight vs Thunder? Final injury update on Spurs star
content: San Antonio Spurs' De'Aaron Fox remains a game-time decision for Game 3 against the Oklahoma City Thunder due to a right high ankle sprain. His potential return is crucial for the tied series, offering scoring and playmaking to support Victor Wembanyama. Without him, pressure mounts on other guards against OKC's defense.

title: MP high court orders 2nd autopsy on Twisha Sharma’s body; AIIMS Delhi doctors to fly to Bhopal
content: The Madhya Pradesh High Court has ordered the state government to arrange for a specialized AIIMS, Delhi medical team to conduct a second autopsy on Twisha Sharma's body in Bhopal. This decision follows the rejection of the family's initial request by a lower court. The court emphasized bolstering public confidence in the investigation process.

title: Beggar on Mumbai footpath turns out to be missing medical student from Nanded, reunited with kin
content: A routine police drive in Mumbai led to an emotional reunion as a disoriented beggar was identified as a former medical student. Separated from his family during a mental health crisis, the youth's story unfolded after compassionate officers provided him with care.

title: Watch: SpaceX Starship bursts into flames during Indian Ocean splashdown after test flight
content: SpaceX's Starship rocket completed its 12th test flight with a controlled splashdown in the Indian Ocean, despite engine malfunctions and a booster issue. The massive spacecraft deployed mock satellites during its high-risk mission. This crucial test flight advances SpaceX's lunar ambitions for NASA's Artemis program and comes amid reports of a potential IPO.

title: ‘The only thing stopping Vaibhav Sooryavanshi is his age’: Ex-England captain
content: Vaibhav Sooryavanshi, a 15-year-old Indian cricketer, is captivating global audiences with his IPL 2026 performances. Former England captain Michael Vaughan believes Sooryavanshi's age is the only barrier to his India debut. Vaughan considers him the season's best opener, urging his inclusion in the T20I squad. Sooryavanshi's exceptional batting has made him a standout player.

title: Petrol, diesel prices hiked by around 90 paise again; third increase in 10 days
content: Fuel prices saw another increase today. Petrol and diesel costs rose by less than one rupee per litre. This is the third price hike this month. The government aims to cover losses from higher crude oil prices. Global crude oil rates have climbed due to the Iran conflict. Consumers are facing rising fuel expenses again.

title: Rs 69,000 for answer sheets: CBSE portal glitch leaves students, parents baffled
content: CBSE Class 12 students face post-result anxiety due to glitches in revaluation portals, including fluctuating fees and inaccessible services. The board has extended deadlines and cited unprecedented traffic and unauthorized interference for disruptions. Students report issues with website crashes, payment failures, and unclear scanned answer sheets, leading to widespread frustration and calls for intervention.

title: ‘Nobody is missing Dhoni': Ex-India captain tears into CSK management
content: Krishnamachari Srikkanth slammed Chennai Super Kings management for misleading fans about MS Dhoni's fitness throughout IPL 2026. He accused the franchise of creating false hope with repeated suggestions of Dhoni's imminent return, despite him missing the entire season due to injury. Srikkanth urged for transparency, stating fans were prepared for the Dhoni era's end.

title: Heatwave conditions likely in parts of Delhi till May 28
content: Delhi's four-day heatwave streak ended Friday, but intense heat persists. While Saturday may see thundery developments, significant relief is unlikely, with heatwave conditions expected until May 28. Maximum temperatures are predicted to hover between 43-46°C, with an orange alert issued. Delhi experienced its first warm night of the season on Thursday.

title: How Punjab Kings can qualify for IPL 2026 playoffs
content: The IPL 2026 playoff race intensifies as Punjab Kings face a must-win game against Lucknow Super Giants. Even with a victory, their qualification hinges on the outcomes of Rajasthan Royals vs. Mumbai Indians and Kolkata Knight Riders vs. Delhi Capitals matches. Punjab Kings need specific results to advance without relying on net run rate.

title: 'Drishyam 3' BO day 2: Mohanlal film slows down; worldwide gross reaches Rs 76.18 cr
content: Mohanlal's 'Drishyam 3' experienced a 30.3% dip in Indian box office collections on its second day, earning Rs 11.05 crore. Despite this, the film is performing exceptionally well globally, with overseas markets contributing Rs 20 crore on Day 2 alone, pushing the worldwide gross to Rs 76.18 crore. The Malayalam version leads domestic collections.

title: 'Usko apni life se hatane ke baad ... ': Chahal on life after quitting alcohol
content: Yuzvendra Chahal revealed quitting alcohol was the best decision of his life, leading to a significant positive change. He now focuses more on himself, family, and friends, understanding his support system better. This move came after a period of depression and mental health struggles, prompting him to seek a healthier path.

title: 2 Indians die on Everest after summiting; 3rd critical at 7,900m
content: Nivesh Karki, executive director and co-founder of Pioneer Adventure, the expedition agency handling the dead climbers, said, “They fell ill while descending at high altitude. We are working out how to retrieve the bodies.”

title: Fake ID, AI Photos, Marriage Promises: How Man Defrauded Gujarat Women On Dating Apps
content: Ahmedabad, May 23 (IANS) The Ahmedabad Crime Branch has arrested a 27-year-old man accused of impersonating a Gujarat Police Sub-Inspector on dating and matrimonial platforms by using AI-generated photographs and police insignia to allegedly deceive

title: Hyderabad Man, 44, Jailed 60 Days for Repeatedly Assaulting Elderly Parents
content: The sentence was passed on Friday by the Special Judicial Magistrate Court. The elderly parents had lodged a complaint on May 21, stating that their son had been harassing and assaulting them for a long time.

title: Marco Rubio India Visit Live Updates: Top Trump Aide Concludes Kolkata Visit, Next Stop Is Delhi
content: Marco Rubio India Visit Live Updates: The top US diplomat is scheduled to hold talks with External Affairs Minister S Jaishankar and attend a meeting of the Quad foreign ministers.

title: 27 Nations Seek World Bank Funding Amid Iran War Impacting Global Energy
content: The World Bank document did not name the countries or the total amount of funds potentially being sought. The World Bank declined to comment.

title: UN Nuclear Treaty Talks End Without Deal Amid US-Iran Dispute
content: Vietnam's UN Ambassador Do Hung Viet, who chaired the conference, announced that there was no consensus among the 191 parties to the Nuclear Nonproliferation Treaty on even a watered-down final document.

title: Watch: Elon Musk's SpaceX Starship Explodes During Splashdown In Indian Ocean
content: The third-generation Starship spacecraft carried out a maneuver that saw it flip upright and reignite its engines for control, despite one being out of commission.

title: Gurugram Metro Halts For 40 Minutes Amid Power Cut, Commuters Walk On Tracks
content: An official said the disruption was triggered due to a technical fault, which led to an oil leak and subsequent blast in the transfer circuit.

title: 'Spoke Truths That Trump Hated': Iran Praises Tulsi Gabbard After Resignation
content: Tulsi Gabbard shared her resignation letter and said she feels it's imperative she stays by her husband's side.

title: VIP Treatment For Samarth Singh In Court? Twisha Sharma's Family New Claims
content: Anurag Srivastava, counsel for Twisha Sharma's father, alleged that Samarth Singh was sitting inside the courtroom of the District and Sessions Judge and the doors were shut while he was inside.

title: Petrol Now Costs Rs 110 In Kolkata, 99 In Delhi: Know Fuel Prices In Your City
content: Prices were earlier raised by Rs 3 per litre on May 15 and by 90 paise on May 19. With the latest revision, fuel prices have risen by nearly Rs 5 per litre in total.

title: Quad, Oil, Defence: Why Marco Rubio's India Visit Carries High Stakes
content: India continues to purchase large volumes of discounted Russian oil, but the US is looking to expand its footprint in India's energy market through LNG and crude exports.

title: US Considering New Strikes On Iran Amid Ongoing Negotiations: Report
content: Negotiations are said to be ongoing, with Pakistan -- which is mediating between the US and Iran -- sending its military chief to Tehran in an attempt to seal a deal.

title: Trump To Miss Son's Wedding Due To Iran War, Says "Love For US Doesn't Allow Me"
content: Trump had said a day earlier that the Iran war made it "bad timing" for him to attend Donald Trump Jr's wedding to Bettina Anderson in the Bahamas this weekend.

title: H-1B Visa Applications Drop 38%. Trump Administration Says Days Of Abuse Over
content: Data released by the US Citizenship and Immigration Services (USCIS) showed that properly submitted H-1B registrations fell by 38.5 per cent compared to last year, from 343,981 in fiscal year 2026 to 211,600 for fiscal year 2027.

title: "He Wasn't Hiding": Lawyer Of Twisha Sharma's Husband On His Disappearance
content: Twisha Sharma Death: Samarth Singh's lawyer, Mrigendra Singh, blamed Twisha Sharma's family members for her death.

title: Highlights: Bar Council Suspends Samarth Singh From Legal Practice
content: Twisha Sharma Death Updates: The case came under scrutiny as the Madhya Pradesh Police faced criticism for an inefficient probe into the case, while Giribala Singh was accused of exerting undue influence.

content: With PM Modi asking people to practice energy conservation over the coming year, Haasan emphasised that national duty must transcend party politics.

title: In 1st-ever performance review, ministries ranked on delays, grievance redressal
content: cabinet secretary T V Somanathan presented the ranking of ministries and departments on each of these parameters at the meeting of the Council of Ministers . the score cards were prepared by the Cabinet Secretariat and their sharing was intended to usher a sense of competition to end any delay in clearing of files .

title: 'If both parents IAS officers, why reservations': SC questions quota for well-off kids
content: wards of well-off families should be kept out of the purview of OBC quota . supreme court raises question on why children of economically and educationally advanced families be allowed to avail the benefit of reservation under OBC category .

title: Indian trucker held in US for fatal hit-and-run; 5th case in 9 months
content: manvir Singh, an undocumented Indian national, has been detained . he veered off the road, struck a guardrail and triggered a collision . the crash is the latest in a series of fatalities involving Indian nationals .

title: 'Twisha Sharma's mom-in law tried to tinker with evidence': MP govt to HC
content: the announcement coincided with the arrest of the former model-actor's absconding husband, lawyer Samarth Singh, on the premises of the district court in Jabalpur ahead of a planned surrender . the state govt had formally handed over the probe to the CBI . she was camping in Bhopal for over a week to demand a proper investigation into allegations of foul play in her death .

title: NEET physics paper leak: NTA-appointed expert arrested by CBI in Pune
content: manisha Sanjay Havaldar is accused of leaking the physics question paper . she served as the headmistress of sheth Hiralal Saraf Prashala in Budhwar Peth . the total number of accused has risen to 11 .

title: Rajya Sabha polls for 24 seats on June 18; Kharge, Deve Gowda set to retire
content: the 24 seats are spread across Andhra Pradesh, Gujarat (4), karnataka (3), Madhya Pradesh (3), Rajasthan (3), Jharkhand (2) and one vacancy each in four northeast states of arunachal Pradesh, Manipur, Meghalaya and Mizoram . the lone Congress MP in RS from Gujarat retiring and his party lacking numbers to retain the seat, the bastion will no longer have any member .
